mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo_task (user_id, system_code, task_name, task_level, task_detail, task_link, task_suggestion, estimated_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{systemCode}, #{taskName}, #{taskLevel}, #{taskDetail}, #{taskLink}, #{taskSuggestion}, #{estimatedTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM todo_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE task_level WHEN 'P1' THEN 1 WHEN 'P2' THEN 2 WHEN 'P3' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM todo_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND system_code = #{systemCode} ORDER BY CASE task_level WHEN 'P1' THEN 1 WHEN 'P2' THEN 2 WHEN 'P3' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, created_at DESC
